_comment: Durable history of manual SEO changes (CTR/title/meta). The weekly pulse task and any optimization routine MUST read this + the live Shopify global.title_tag before acting, and NEVER repeat a change already logged here. A page counts as 'already optimized' if it has a non-null global.title_tag.
goal: Grow confirmed organic-search sales (Shopify customerJourneySummary firstVisit.sourceType == SEO, revenue > 0) toward 20/month during the May-September season.

changes.new_title_tag: Oakley Alternative Cycling Glasses, Fair Price | Velluto
changes.rationale: Highest-impression commercial page on the domain; near-zero CTR. Biggest single lever.

changes.new_title_tag: Best Cycling Glasses 2026, Tested for Value | Velluto
changes.rationale: High-impression commercial query, page-1 border, weak CTR.

changes.new_title_tag: Anti-Fog Cycling Sunglasses That Actually Work | Velluto
changes.rationale: Commercial 'anti fog' query, page-1, very weak CTR.

changes.new_title_tag: Cycling Glasses vs Regular Sunglasses: Worth It? | Velluto
changes.rationale: Proven converter (organic order #1255, 141.30 EUR). Strengthen snippet + product bridge.
